cause_analysis.narrative: Djemi Hair Braiding churned on 2026-02-24 after 167 days with Zoca. Sentiment turned negative on 2026-03-31 (email) — first complaint keyword: "issue". Classification: explicit cancellation. The client formally asked to cancel; the question is whether a save attempt was made.
recommendations: [Retention] Implement a 'cancellation keyword' realtime alert to AMs + Growth team. Today this signal is discovered only post-churn.
[Offer] Build a 3-tier retention offer ladder (pause / discount / scope change) so AMs have something concrete to counter with.
